subject: Project meeting schedule for Friday
body_text: Hi team, please join the project meeting this Friday at 10 AM in the lab. We will review the Week 14 progress and assign next steps.
rationale: Legitimate scheduling email with no suspicious request.

subject: Book reservation is ready for pickup
body_text: The book you reserved is available at the main library circulation desk. Please pick it up within seven days using your student ID card.
rationale: Expected library notification with ordinary account link.

subject: Database homework feedback released
body_text: Feedback for homework 3 has been released on the course platform. Please review the comments before the next lab session.
rationale: Course update without pressure, credential request, or attachment risk.

subject: Receipt for your textbook order
body_text: Thank you for your order. Your receipt is included below. The textbook will be shipped to the campus store for pickup next week.
rationale: Expected purchase receipt with benign attachment name.

subject: Volunteer signup for Saturday workshop
body_text: We need two volunteers for the robotics workshop on Saturday. Please reply if you can help with setup from 8 AM to 9 AM.

subject: Interview confirmation
body_text: This message confirms your interview on Monday at 2 PM. The meeting link will be sent from the same address one hour before the interview.

subject: Workshop registration confirmed
body_text: Your registration for the security workshop has been confirmed. Please bring your laptop and arrive ten minutes before the opening session.

subject: Paper discussion notes
body_text: Attached are the notes from today's paper discussion. Please read section 4 before our next meeting.
rationale: Academic follow-up with expected document attachment.

subject: Scheduled wireless maintenance
body_text: Campus wireless service may be unavailable from 1 AM to 3 AM on Sunday due to scheduled maintenance. No action is required from users.
rationale: Informational IT notice with no credential request.

subject: Updated project task list
body_text: I updated the shared task list after our meeting. Please check your assigned items before Wednesday and leave comments if anything is unclear.

subject: Monthly invoice available
body_text: Your monthly cloud lab invoice is available in the billing portal. The payment method on file will be charged automatically on June 5.
rationale: Legitimate invoice notification without urgent pressure or suspicious domain.

subject: Reminder: thesis proposal rehearsal
body_text: This is a calendar reminder for thesis proposal rehearsal tomorrow at 3 PM in room 402. Please bring printed slides if needed.

subject: Limited time deal: 80 percent off today only
body_text: Congratulations! You have been selected for an exclusive discount. Buy now and save 80 percent on our premium membership before midnight.
rationale: Promotional bulk email with sales pressure but no credential theft.

subject: Cheap flights and hotel bundles this week
body_text: Browse this week's travel deals, hotel bundles, and vacation packages. Subscribe today to receive daily discount alerts.

subject: Free webinar: grow your online brand
body_text: Join our free webinar and learn ten strategies to grow your online brand. Seats are limited, so reserve your place now.

subject: Your weekly coupon pack is here
body_text: Open your weekly coupon pack for discounts on gadgets, clothing, and food delivery. These offers expire soon.

subject: Try our workout app for free
body_text: Start your free trial and unlock personalized workouts, meal plans, and daily coaching reminders. Cancel anytime from your account page.

subject: Weekend food festival discounts
body_text: Show this message at participating restaurants to get a discount during the weekend food festival.
rationale: Advertising email with no direct security threat.

subject: Flash sale on laptops and accessories
body_text: Today only: laptops, monitors, and accessories at special prices. Visit our store page to compare all deals.

subject: Five resume tips for new graduates
body_text: This week's newsletter includes resume tips, interview advice, and recommended job boards for new graduates.

subject: Upgrade your plan for more movies
body_text: Upgrade your streaming plan to unlock more movies and offline downloads. This promotion is available for selected users.

subject: Bulk stationery discount
body_text: Order pens, notebooks, folders, and printer paper in bulk this month and receive a discount on office supplies.

subject: Member rewards expire soon
body_text: Your shopping club reward points expire soon. Browse participating stores and redeem offers before the end of the month.

subject: Learn a new language in 30 days
body_text: Enroll in our language course and get access to video lessons, quizzes, and daily practice reminders.

subject: Urgent: verify your account password
body_text: Your mailbox will be disabled today. Verify your account password immediately at the link below to avoid losing access.
rationale: Credential phishing with urgency and suspicious login domain.

subject: Payroll deposit failed
body_text: Your payroll deposit failed because your bank details are incomplete. Open the secure form and update your account information within two hours.
rationale: Requests sensitive banking information under time pressure.

subject: Shared document requires sign in
body_text: A confidential document has been shared with you. Sign in with your school account to view it before the access window closes.

subject: Past due invoice requires wire transfer
body_text: Please process the attached invoice today. Our bank account changed, so send the wire transfer to the new account listed in the attachment.
rationale: Business email compromise pattern and macro-enabled attachment.

subject: Unusual login detected
body_text: We detected an unusual login from a new device. Confirm your identity by entering your password and one-time code on the verification page.

subject: Package delivery failed
body_text: Your package could not be delivered. Pay a small redelivery fee now or the parcel will be returned to sender.
rationale: Payment phishing with fake delivery pressure.

subject: Scholarship award confirmation needed
body_text: You have been selected for a scholarship payment. Send your student ID, date of birth, and bank account details to claim the award.
rationale: Sensitive data request and macro-enabled spreadsheet.

subject: Confidential task
body_text: I am in a meeting and need you to buy gift cards for an urgent client request. Reply with the card codes when finished.
rationale: Executive impersonation and gift card scam.

subject: VPN certificate expired
body_text: Your VPN certificate expired. Download the attached installer and run it to restore remote access.
rationale: Executable attachment disguised as security update.

subject: Tax refund pending approval
body_text: A tax refund is pending. Confirm your identity and card number on the refund portal to receive the payment today.
rationale: Financial phishing and card data request.

subject: Storage quota exceeded
body_text: Your storage quota is exceeded. Log in through this page to prevent file deletion. Failure to act today will lock your account.
rationale: Account lock pressure and suspicious login domain.

subject: Remote assistant job offer
body_text: You are approved for a remote assistant role. Deposit the attached check and send part of the funds to our equipment vendor.

subject: Course add deadline reminder
body_text: The course add deadline is Friday at 5 PM. Please review your enrollment status in the student portal before the deadline.

subject: Lab access card pickup
body_text: Your lab access card is ready for pickup at the department office. Please bring your student ID during office hours.

subject: Accepted poster presentation details
body_text: Your poster presentation has been accepted. Please upload the final poster file by next Monday using the conference submission page.

subject: Teaching assistant training reminder
body_text: This is a reminder that teaching assistant training begins at 9 AM tomorrow in the learning center auditorium.

subject: Tuition payment receipt
body_text: Your tuition payment has been received. The official receipt is available in the student finance portal.

subject: Dataset review notes
body_text: I reviewed the sample labels and left comments on three borderline spam examples. Please check the shared document when you have time.

subject: Building air conditioning maintenance
body_text: Air conditioning maintenance is scheduled for the engineering building this Saturday morning. Offices may be warmer than usual.

subject: IRB office hour schedule
body_text: The research office will hold IRB consultation hours on Wednesday afternoon. Appointments can be reserved through the office website.

subject: Cloud lab maintenance completed
body_text: The scheduled cloud lab maintenance has been completed. All virtual machines are available again.

subject: Dormitory package notification
body_text: A package addressed to you has arrived at the dormitory front desk. Please pick it up before 10 PM.

subject: Weekly research check-in
body_text: Let's keep our weekly research check-in at 4 PM on Thursday. Please bring the latest experiment notes.

subject: Assignment deadline extended
body_text: The assignment 4 deadline has been extended by two days. The new deadline is Sunday at 11:59 PM.

subject: Print quota balance update
body_text: Your monthly print quota has been updated. You can view the current balance in the campus printing portal.

subject: Alumni panel registration confirmed
body_text: Your registration for the alumni career panel is confirmed. The event will be held online next Tuesday evening.

subject: Software license renewal notice
body_text: The university software license server will renew student licenses automatically this weekend. No action is required.

subject: Exam room assignment
body_text: Your exam room assignment for the final exam is room 205 in the engineering building. Please arrive ten minutes early.

subject: Slides for tomorrow's rehearsal
body_text: I uploaded the draft slides for tomorrow's rehearsal. Please review the experiment overview section before the meeting.

subject: Annual security awareness training
body_text: Annual security awareness training opens next week. The training is informational and does not require password changes.

subject: Meal box discount for students
body_text: Try our meal box subscription and get your first week at a reduced price. Choose from healthy lunch and dinner plans.

subject: Top ten gadgets this month
body_text: Read our monthly gadget roundup and compare headphones, tablets, and smart watches selected by our editors.

subject: Limited enrollment for coding bootcamp
body_text: Join our online coding bootcamp and receive a limited-time student discount. Enrollment closes soon.

subject: Free drink after five purchases
body_text: Join our coffee rewards club and receive a free drink after five purchases this month.

subject: Weekend game sale starts now
body_text: Browse the weekend game sale and save on selected puzzle, strategy, and simulation titles.

subject: Featured internships near you
body_text: See featured internships and paid projects selected for students in technical majors.

subject: Simple budgeting tips for students
body_text: This newsletter includes budgeting tips, savings ideas, and a sponsored credit card comparison guide.

subject: Student music plan discount
body_text: Upgrade to the student music plan and listen without ads for a reduced monthly price.

subject: New sneakers released today
body_text: Shop our new sneaker collection and receive free shipping on orders placed this week.

subject: Earn rewards by taking surveys
body_text: Complete short surveys and collect points for gift cards. New surveys are available every day.

subject: Design templates for your next presentation
body_text: Download presentation templates, icons, and stock photos from our design marketplace.

subject: Protect your phone with new cases
body_text: Our newest phone cases and chargers are available with a student discount this week.

subject: Founder webinar invitation
body_text: Register for our startup founder webinar and learn how to pitch investors in five steps.

subject: Ergonomic chair sale
body_text: Improve your study setup with discounted ergonomic chairs and desk accessories.

subject: This week's movie recommendations
body_text: Our weekly movie newsletter includes streaming recommendations and sponsored subscription offers.

subject: Extra storage for your photos
body_text: Buy extra cloud storage for photos and documents. This promotional plan is available for new users.

subject: Meet language partners online
body_text: Join our language exchange platform to meet conversation partners and unlock premium matching features.

subject: Tablet deals for class notes
body_text: Compare tablets, styluses, and keyboard cases with limited-time back-to-school discounts.

subject: Invoice payment account changed
body_text: Please update our payment account before sending today's invoice payment. The new bank details are in the attached document.

subject: Single sign-on session expired
body_text: Your single sign-on session expired. Log in within 30 minutes to keep access to email and course materials.

subject: Password reset required immediately
body_text: Your password is scheduled to expire today. Confirm your current password on the reset page to avoid account suspension.

subject: Research award payment pending
body_text: Your research award payment is pending. Submit your passport number and bank account information to release the funds.

subject: Scanned document from office copier
body_text: A scanned document is attached. Enable editing and macros to view the full content.

subject: VPN login blocked
body_text: Your VPN login was blocked due to certificate errors. Install the attached certificate updater to restore access.

subject: Student refund available
body_text: A student refund is available. Enter your card number and security code on the refund portal to receive it today.

subject: Urgent confidential purchase
body_text: I need you to purchase gift cards for a visiting speaker before the meeting starts. Send the codes by reply.

subject: File deletion warning
body_text: Your drive quota is full. Sign in through the verification page to prevent automatic deletion of shared files.

subject: Customs fee required for delivery
body_text: Your package is waiting at customs. Pay the handling fee within two hours or delivery will be cancelled.

subject: Immediate remote job approval
body_text: You have been selected for a remote job. Deposit the onboarding check and transfer part of the funds to buy equipment.

subject: Grade appeal document
body_text: A grade appeal document is attached. Open the file and enable content to view the instructor comments.

subject: Card transaction blocked
body_text: A card transaction was blocked. Confirm your card number and one-time code to restore access.

subject: Travel reimbursement form
body_text: Your conference reimbursement is pending. Submit banking details and a copy of your ID through the form.

subject: Meeting plugin update required
body_text: Your meeting plugin is out of date. Download and run the attached updater before joining today's call.

subject: Mailbox quota exceeded
body_text: Your mailbox quota has been exceeded. Verify your mailbox password to keep receiving new messages.

subject: Same-day supplier payment
body_text: Please send a same-day transfer to the supplier account below. Do not wait for the regular approval process.

subject: Critical security patch
body_text: A critical security patch is attached. Run the patch immediately to prevent account lockout.
